qa_pairs.question: How can a Principal Investigator (PI) add another PI who was not initially a co-PI on their Resource Allocation Competition (RAC) application to a Cloud Resource Allocation Project (RAP)?
qa_pairs.answer: To add a PI not originally listed as a co-PI to a Cloud RAP, the PI must go to the 'Add Members' section on the RAP membership page and enter the new PI's CCRI in the 'One by one using a CCRI' field. Once this PI is added, the original PI can then use the 'In bulk' mechanism to add any of the new PI's associated sponsored user roles.

qa_pairs.question: What access is automatically granted to new members added to a Cloud Resource Allocation Project (RAP), and what management options are available to the Principal Investigator?
qa_pairs.answer: Any new member added to a Cloud RAP automatically gains full access to the associated cloud allocation and OpenStack tenants. The Principal Investigator (PI) can also promote members to Managers or remove them from the RAP at any time if desired.
